title: bletia × schilleriana
intro: Bletia × schilleriana, also known as the Schiller's orchid or Schiller's bletia, is a hybrid orchid species that results from the cross between Bletia purpurea and Bletia orestias. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bletia × schilleriana include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a useful remedy for respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
